summary: Completed comprehensive testing of The Imperium app - personal sovereignty system with Vel'nar language tutor, daily planner, meal planning, warrior practices, rite ceremonies, meditations, and calendar functionality

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 500 due to LLM API budget exceeded
flaky_endpoints.error_details: Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.00146, Max budget: 0.001

integration_issues.issue: Chat functionality disabled due to backend API budget limit

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with Imperium logo in hero and sidebar
Navigation sidebar works - all 8 navigation links present and functional
Vel'nar Tutor Course tab shows complete lesson structure (6 levels, Level 1-6)
Vel'nar Tutor Conversation tab interface present (input disabled due to API budget)
Daily Planner morning/evening practices with checkboxes work
Daily Planner Activity Log tab allows adding and viewing logs
Daily Planner Commitments section allows adding commitments
Daily Planner Quick Links navigate to correct pages
Daily Planner Settings available for data retention
Meal Plan displays Day 1 meals and navigation works perfectly
Meal Plan 30-day calendar navigation functional
Warrior Practices page shows all 4 practices (Iaido, Kyudo, Systema, Throwing Daggers)
Warrior Practices stage progression and requirements tracking works
Rite of the Uncrowned shows 6 stages and Begin button functional
Rite progression tracking and stage completion works
Challenge coin link points to challengecoins4less.com
Meditations page has timer and meditation selection working
Meditation timer start/pause/reset functionality works
Calendar page displays events and month navigation works
Calendar event creation and management functional

success_percentage.integration: 95% (only Vel'nar chat affected by API budget)

action_item_for_main_agent: Increase LLM API budget limit for Vel'nar chat functionality. Current budget of $0.001 is insufficient - recommend increasing to at least $0.01 to enable conversational AI features.
